no: Lichdom by Daniel Valle. Lich transformation questline via Gravetender Morris in Athkatla Graveyard (SoA) or Saradush (ToB). Adds Lich Dust to ALL liches/demiliches including mod-added ones. Install BEFORE Ascension and Longer Road. Compatible with SCS and Tweaks Anthology. Has crossmod content for Dusk, Sandrah, and other NPC mods. Do NOT install after EET_End.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Install Lichdom BEFORE Ascension to avoid bugs. Users reported installation errors when Lichdom installed after Ascension.
Install Lichdom BEFORE The Longer Road. Users reported installation errors when installed after.
Compatible with SCS per user reports. No specific install order requirement.
Compatible with Tweaks Anthology per user reports.

Both modify demilich.cre and hldemi.cre. Lichdom adds Lich Dust to inventory (ADD_CRE_ITEM). Polylich overwrites abilities and stats. Compatible — different aspects of same files. Install order does not matter.

sum: Allows party members to undergo lich transformation via Gravetender Morris questline. Grants undead immunities, paralyzing touch, phylactery system.

co.n: Lichdom for the Baldur's Gate, Enhanced Edition Games.
co.tp2n: Lichdom for the Baldur's Gate, Enhanced Edition Games.
co.no: Lich transformation questline. Talk to Gravetender Morris in Athkatla Graveyard (SoA) or Saradush (ToB). Adds Lich Dust to ALL liches/demiliches including mod-added ones. ACTION_READLN with 7+ interactive prompts — has defaults mode (option 1 skips all).
